raw_sql: SELECT id, link FROM link_type ORDER BY id;

WITH sequel_pairs AS (
  SELECT
    LEAST(ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id) AS a,
    GREATEST(ml.movie_id, ml.linked_movie_id) AS b
  FROM movie_link ml
  WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)  -- follows / followed by
),
-- union both directions to build adjacency
edges AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS src, linked_movie_id AS dst FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1, 2)
),
-- find connected components via repeated self-join (limited depth)
base AS (
  SELECT src AS movie_id, src AS root FROM edges
  UNION
  SELECT dst AS movie_id, src AS root FROM edges
),
clustered AS (
  SELECT movie_id, MIN(root) AS cluster_id FROM base GROUP BY movie_id
),
franchise_size AS (
  SELECT
    c.cluster_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) AS film_count,
    MIN(t.production_year) AS earliest_year,
    MAX(t.production_year) AS latest_year
  FROM clustered c
  JOIN title t ON t.id = c.movie_id
  WHERE t.production_year >= 1980
    AND t.kind_id = 1  -- movies only
  GROUP BY c.cluster_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.movie_id) >= 3
  ORDER BY film_count DESC
  LIMIT 10
)
SELECT fs.*, t.title AS anchor_title
FROM franchise_size fs
JOIN title t ON t.id = fs.cluster_id
ORDER BY film_count DESC;

WITH RECURSIVE
roots AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ml.movie_id AS root_id
  FROM movie_link ml
  WHERE ml.link_type_id = 2
  AND ml.movie_id NOT IN (
    SELECT linked_movie_id FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id = 2
  )
),
chain(root_id, node_id, depth) AS (
  SELECT r.root_id, r.root_id, 0
  FROM roots r
  UNION ALL
  SELECT c.root_id, ml.linked_movie_id, c.depth + 1
  FROM chain c
  JOIN movie_link ml ON ml.movie_id = c.node_id AND ml.link_type_id = 2
  WHERE c.depth < 15
),
franchise_stats AS (
  SELECT
    c.root_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.node_id) AS total_films,
    MIN(t.production_year)    AS first_year,
    MAX(t.production_year)    AS last_year
  FROM chain c
  JOIN title t ON t.id = c.node_id
  WHERE t.production_year >= 1980
    AND t.kind_id = 1
  GROUP BY c.root_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.node_id) >= 3
)
SELECT fs.total_films, fs.first_year, fs.last_year, t.title AS root_title
FROM franchise_stats fs
JOIN title t ON t.id = fs.root_id
ORDER BY fs.total_films DESC
LIMIT 15;

WITH RECURSIVE
-- All sequel/prequel edges as undirected
edges AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS a, linked_movie_id AS b
  FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1, 2)
  UNION
  SELECT linked_movie_id AS a, movie_id AS b
  FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1, 2)
),
-- Connected components: each node gets the minimum reachable node id as its component
cc(node_id, comp_id) AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT a, a FROM edges
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT b, b FROM edges
),
propagate AS (
  SELECT node_id, comp_id FROM cc
  UNION
  SELECT e.b, p.comp_id
  FROM propagate p
  JOIN edges e ON e.a = p.node_id
  WHERE e.b < p.comp_id  -- only propagate downward to converge
),
components AS (
  SELECT node_id, MIN(comp_id) AS comp_id FROM propagate GROUP BY node_id
),
franchise_stats AS (
  SELECT
    c.comp_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT c.node_id) AS film_count,
    MIN(t.production_year)    AS first_year,
    MAX(t.production_year)    AS last_year
  FROM components c
  JOIN title t ON t.id = c.node_id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1
    AND t.production_year >= 1980
  GROUP BY c.comp_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT c.node_id) >= 4
)
SELECT fs.film_count, fs.first_year, fs.last_year, t.title AS anchor_title, fs.comp_id
FROM franchise_stats fs
JOIN title t ON t.id = fs.comp_id
ORDER BY fs.film_count DESC
LIMIT 15;

-- Find movies with the most sequel connections (1-hop neighborhood size)
WITH sequel_edges AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS a, linked_movie_id AS b
  FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1, 2)
  UNION
  SELECT linked_movie_id, movie_id
  FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1, 2)
),
neighbor_count AS (
  SELECT a AS movie_id, COUNT(DISTINCT b) AS neighbors
  FROM sequel_edges
  GROUP BY a
),
top_hubs AS (
  SELECT nc.movie_id, nc.neighbors, t.title, t.production_year
  FROM neighbor_count nc
  JOIN title t ON t.id = nc.movie_id
  WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1975
  ORDER BY nc.neighbors DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT * FROM top_hubs;

SELECT link_type_id, lt.link, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN link_type lt ON lt.id = ml.link_type_id
GROUP BY link_type_id, lt.link
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

SELECT
  t1.title AS movie,
  t1.production_year AS yr1,
  lt.link,
  t2.title AS linked_movie,
  t2.production_year AS yr2
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN link_type lt ON lt.id = ml.link_type_id
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
  AND t1.kind_id = 1
  AND t2.kind_id = 1
  AND t1.production_year >= 1975
ORDER BY t1.title, t1.production_year
LIMIT 80;

SELECT
  t1.kind_id AS k1, k1.kind AS kind1,
  t2.kind_id AS k2, k2.kind AS kind2,
  COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
JOIN kind_type k1 ON k1.id = t1.kind_id
JOIN kind_type k2 ON k2.id = t2.kind_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
GROUP BY t1.kind_id, k1.kind, t2.kind_id, k2.kind
ORDER BY cnt DESC;

SELECT t1.title AS movie, t1.production_year, lt.link, t2.title AS linked, t2.production_year AS yr2, t1.kind_id, t2.kind_id AS k2
FROM movie_link ml
JOIN link_type lt ON lt.id = ml.link_type_id
JOIN title t1 ON t1.id = ml.movie_id
JOIN title t2 ON t2.id = ml.linked_movie_id
WHERE ml.link_type_id IN (1, 2)
  AND (t1.kind_id = 1 OR t2.kind_id = 1)
  AND t1.production_year >= 1975
ORDER BY t1.title
LIMIT 30;

-- Find the largest connected components in sequel graph, no kind_id filter
WITH all_sequel_nodes AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT movie_id AS nid FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
  UNION
  SELECT DISTINCT linked_movie_id FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
),
-- Build adjacency, pick min neighbor as cluster seed (1 hop only for speed)
node_min AS (
  SELECT
    a.nid,
    MIN(CASE WHEN ml.movie_id = a.nid THEN ml.linked_movie_id
             ELSE ml.movie_id END) AS min_neighbor
  FROM all_sequel_nodes a
  JOIN movie_link ml ON (ml.movie_id = a.nid OR ml.linked_movie_id = a.nid)
                     AND ml.link_type_id IN (1,2)
  GROUP BY a.nid
),
-- Assign cluster = min(self, min_neighbor)
cluster AS (
  SELECT nid, LEAST(nid, min_neighbor) AS comp_id FROM node_min
),
-- Count films per cluster among real movies post-1975
franchise AS (
  SELECT
    c.comp_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id)          AS film_count,
    MIN(t.production_year)        AS first_yr,
    MAX(t.production_year)        AS last_yr,
    STRING_AGG(DISTINCT kt.kind, ',') AS kinds
  FROM cluster c
  JOIN title t ON t.id = c.nid
  JOIN kind_type kt ON kt.id = t.kind_id
  WHERE t.production_year >= 1975
  GROUP BY c.comp_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) >= 4
  ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT f.comp_id, f.film_count, f.first_yr, f.last_yr, f.kinds, t.title AS anchor
FROM franchise f
JOIN title t ON t.id = f.comp_id
ORDER BY f.film_count DESC;

groupby_keys: (LEAST(movie_link.movie_id, (min(CASE WHEN (ml.movie_id = movie_link.movie_id) THEN ml.linked_movie_id ELSE ml.movie_id END))))

predicates: (id = (LEAST(movie_link.movie_id, (min(CASE WHEN (ml.movie_id = movie_link.movie_id) THEN ml.linked_movie_id ELSE ml.movie_id END)))))

raw_sql:
WITH all_nodes AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS nid FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
  UNION
  SELECT linked_movie_id FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
),
node_min AS (
  SELECT
    a.nid,
    MIN(CASE WHEN ml.movie_id = a.nid THEN ml.linked_movie_id ELSE ml.movie_id END) AS min_nbr
  FROM all_nodes a
  JOIN movie_link ml ON (ml.movie_id = a.nid OR ml.linked_movie_id = a.nid)
                     AND ml.link_type_id IN (1,2)
  GROUP BY a.nid
),
cluster AS (
  SELECT nid, LEAST(nid, min_nbr) AS comp_id FROM node_min
),
franchise AS (
  SELECT
    c.comp_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FILTER (WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980) AS movie_count,
    COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) AS total_count,
    MIN(t.production_year) FILTER (WHERE t.kind_id = 1) AS first_yr,
    MAX(t.production_year) FILTER (WHERE t.kind_id = 1) AS last_yr
  FROM cluster c
  JOIN title t ON t.id = c.nid
  GROUP BY c.comp_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FILTER (WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980) >= 3
  ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT t.id) FILTER (WHERE t.kind_id = 1 AND t.production_year >= 1980) DESC
  LIMIT 20
)
SELECT f.comp_id, f.movie_count, f.total_count, f.first_yr, f.last_yr, t.title AS anchor
FROM franchise f
JOIN title t ON t.id = f.comp_id
ORDER BY f.movie_count DESC;

groupby_keys: (LEAST(movie_link.movie_id, (min(CASE WHEN (ml.movie_id = movie_link.movie_id) THEN ml.linked_movie_id ELSE ml.movie_id END))))

raw_sql:
-- Get all movies (kind_id=1) in the top 5 franchise clusters
WITH all_nodes AS (
  SELECT movie_id AS nid FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
  UNION
  SELECT linked_movie_id FROM movie_link WHERE link_type_id IN (1,2)
),
node_min AS (
  SELECT
    a.nid,
    MIN(CASE WHEN ml.movie_id = a.nid THEN ml.linked_movie_id ELSE ml.movie_id END) AS min_nbr
  FROM all_nodes a
  JOIN movie_link ml ON (ml.movie_id = a.nid OR ml.linked_movie_id = a.nid)
                     AND ml.link_type_id IN (1,2)
  GROUP BY a.nid
),
cluster AS (
  SELECT nid, LEAST(nid, min_nbr) AS comp_id FROM node_min
),
top5 AS (
  SELECT comp_id FROM (
    VALUES (132543), (160728), (121825), (138675), (162740)
  ) v(comp_id)
)
SELECT
  c.comp_id,
  t.id AS movie_id,
  t.title,
  t.production_year,
  t.kind_id,
  kt.kind
FROM cluster c
JOIN top5 ON top5.comp_id = c.comp_id
JOIN title t ON t.id = c.nid
JOIN kind_type kt ON kt.id = t.kind_id
WHERE t.kind_id = 1
ORDER BY c.comp_id, t.production_year;

-- Cast overlap across franchise installments + ratings
WITH franchise_movies AS (
  SELECT comp_id, movie_id, title, production_year FROM (VALUES
    (121825, 1708057, 'Back to the Future',          1985),
    (121825, 1708062, 'Back to the Future Part II',  1989),
    (121825, 1708064, 'Back to the Future Part III', 1990),
    (132543, 1816855, 'Denshi Sentai Denjiman: The Movie', 1980),
    (132543, 2330204, 'Taiyô sentai San Barukan: Za Mubi', 1981),
    (132543, 1775582, 'Chôriki sentai Ohranger Vs Kakuranger', 1995),
    (132543, 2271888, 'Seijû sentai Gingaman vs Megaranger', 1999),
    (132543, 2011268, 'Kamen raidâ x Kamen raidâ: Ôzu & Daburu', 2010),
    (132543, 2011254, 'Kamen Raidâ Fôze Za Mûbî', 2012),
    (132543, 2011272, 'Kamen Raidâ × Supâ Sentai', 2012),
    (132543, 2011273, 'Kamen Raidâ × Sûpâ Sentai × Uchû Keiji', 2013),
    (138675, 2195293, 'Peace, Love & Understanding', 1992),
    (138675, 1904335, 'Frog Baseball',               1992),
    (138675, 1718090, 'Beavis and Butt-Head Do America', 1996),
    (160728, 1913188, 'Sailor Moon R Movie',         1993),
    (160728, 1913189, 'Sailor Moon S Movie',         1994),
    (160728, 1730777, 'Sailor Moon SuperS Movie',    1995),
    (160728, 1730778, 'Sailor Moon SuperS Plus',     1995),
    (162740, 1733635, 'Blade',                       1998),
    (162740, 1733643, 'Blade II',                    2002),
    (162740, 1733670, 'Blade: Trinity',              2004)
  ) AS t(comp_id, movie_id, title, production_year)
),
-- Cast per movie (actors + actresses only, top-billed nr_order <= 15)
cast_data AS (
  SELECT fm.comp_id, fm.movie_id, fm.title, fm.production_year, ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_movies fm
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = fm.movie_id
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
    AND (ci.nr_order <= 15 OR ci.nr_order IS NULL)
),
-- For each person, count how many films they appear in per franchise
person_appearances AS (
  SELECT comp_id, person_id, COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS films_in
  FROM cast_data
  GROUP BY comp_id, person_id
),
-- Cast retention per franchise: shared cast members across films
retention AS (
  SELECT
    comp_id,
    COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) AS unique_cast,
    COUNT(DISTINCT person_id) FILTER (WHERE films_in > 1) AS returning_cast,
    COUNT(DISTINCT movie_id) AS total_films
  FROM cast_data cd
  LEFT JOIN person_appearances pa USING (comp_id, person_id)
  GROUP BY comp_id
),
-- Ratings
ratings AS (
  SELECT fm.comp_id, fm.movie_id, fm.title, fm.production_year,
         mii.info::numeric AS rating
  FROM franchise_movies fm
  JOIN movie_info_idx mii ON mii.movie_id = fm.movie_id
  WHERE mii.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
)
SELECT
  r.comp_id,
  r.title,
  r.production_year,
  r.rating,
  ret.unique_cast,
  ret.returning_cast,
  ROUND(ret.returning_cast::numeric / NULLIF(ret.unique_cast, 0) * 100, 1) AS retention_pct,
  ret.total_films
FROM ratings r
JOIN retention ret ON ret.comp_id = r.comp_id
ORDER BY r.comp_id, r.production_year;

-- Per-film sequential cast overlap vs rating
WITH franchise_movies AS (
  SELECT comp_id, movie_id, title, production_year,
         ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY comp_id ORDER BY production_year, movie_id) AS seq
  FROM (VALUES
    (121825, 1708057, 'Back to the Future',          1985),
    (121825, 1708062, 'Back to the Future Part II',  1989),
    (121825, 1708064, 'Back to the Future Part III', 1990),
    (160728, 1913188, 'Sailor Moon R Movie',         1993),
    (160728, 1913189, 'Sailor Moon S Movie',         1994),
    (160728, 1730777, 'Sailor Moon SuperS Movie',    1995),
    (160728, 1730778, 'Sailor Moon SuperS Plus',     1995),
    (162740, 1733635, 'Blade',                       1998),
    (162740, 1733643, 'Blade II',                    2002),
    (162740, 1733670, 'Blade: Trinity',              2004),
    (132543, 1816855, 'Denjiman Movie',              1980),
    (132543, 2330204, 'San Barukan Movie',           1981),
    (132543, 1775582, 'Ohranger vs Kakuranger',      1995),
    (132543, 2271888, 'Gingaman vs Megaranger',      1999),
    (132543, 2011268, 'Kamen Rider Movie 2010',      2010),
    (132543, 2011254, 'Kamen Rider Fourze Movie',    2012),
    (132543, 2011272, 'Super Hero Taisen',           2012),
    (132543, 2011273, 'Super Hero Taisen Z',         2013),
    (138675, 2195293, 'Peace, Love & Understanding', 1992),
    (138675, 1904335, 'Frog Baseball',               1992),
    (138675, 1718090, 'Beavis and Butt-Head Do America', 1996)
  ) AS t(comp_id, movie_id, title, production_year)
),
cast_per_film AS (
  SELECT fm.comp_id, fm.movie_id, fm.title, fm.production_year, fm.seq,
         ci.person_id
  FROM franchise_movies fm
  JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = fm.movie_id
  WHERE ci.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role IN ('actor','actress'))
    AND (ci.nr_order <= 15 OR ci.nr_order IS NULL)
),
-- Consecutive film pairs
film_pairs AS (
  SELECT
    a.comp_id,
    a.movie_id     AS prev_id,
    b.movie_id     AS curr_id,
    b.title        AS curr_title,
    b.production_year AS curr_year,
    b.seq
  FROM franchise_movies a
  JOIN franchise_movies b ON b.comp_id = a.comp_id AND b.seq = a.seq + 1
),
-- Overlap: count actors appearing in both prev and curr film
overlap AS (
  SELECT
    fp.comp_id, fp.curr_id, fp.curr_title, fp.curr_year, fp.seq,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cprev.person_id)                             AS prev_cast_size,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ccurr.person_id)                             AS curr_cast_size,
    COUNT(DISTINCT cprev.person_id)
      FILTER (WHERE ccurr.person_id IS NOT NULL)                AS shared_cast
  FROM film_pairs fp
  JOIN cast_per_film cprev ON cprev.movie_id = fp.prev_id
  LEFT JOIN cast_per_film ccurr
         ON ccurr.movie_id = fp.curr_id
        AND ccurr.person_id = cprev.person_id
  GROUP BY fp.comp_id, fp.curr_id, fp.curr_title, fp.curr_year, fp.seq
),
ratings AS (
  SELECT movie_id, info::numeric AS rating
  FROM movie_info_idx
  WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
)
SELECT
  o.comp_id,
  o.curr_title,
  o.curr_year,
  o.seq             AS installment,
  o.prev_cast_size,
  o.curr_cast_size,
  o.shared_cast,
  ROUND(o.shared_cast::numeric / NULLIF(o.prev_cast_size, 0) * 100, 1) AS pct_retained,
  r.rating
FROM overlap o
LEFT JOIN ratings r ON r.movie_id = o.curr_id
ORDER BY o.comp_id, o.seq;

-- Rating delta from franchise opener vs cast retention per sequel
WITH data AS (
  SELECT comp_id, curr_title, curr_year, installment, pct_retained, rating,
         first_value(rating) OVER (
           PARTITION BY comp_id ORDER BY installment
         ) AS opener_rating
  FROM (VALUES
    (121825, 'Back to the Future Part II',  1989, 2, 38.1, 7.7),
    (121825, 'Back to the Future Part III', 1990, 3, 33.3, 7.3),
    (132543, 'San Barukan Movie',           1981, 2, 16.7, 5.7),
    (132543, 'Ohranger vs Kakuranger',      1995, 3,  7.7, 4.2),
    (132543, 'Kamen Rider Movie 2010',      2010, 5,  0.0, 6.4),
    (132543, 'Kamen Rider Fourze Movie',    2012, 6,  0.0, 6.0),
    (132543, 'Super Hero Taisen',           2012, 7, 57.1, 6.9),
    (138675, 'Peace, Love & Understanding', 1992, 2,100.0, 5.8),
    (138675, 'Beavis & Butt-Head Do America',1996,3,100.0, 6.6),
    (160728, 'Sailor Moon S Movie',         1994, 2, 66.7, 7.0),
    (160728, 'Sailor Moon SuperS Movie',    1995, 3, 80.6, 7.0),
    (160728, 'Sailor Moon SuperS Plus',     1995, 4, 27.3, 8.5),
    (162740, 'Blade II',                    2002, 2,  7.7, 6.6),
    (162740, 'Blade: Trinity',              2004, 3, 10.0, 5.8)
  ) AS t(comp_id, curr_title, curr_year, installment, pct_retained, rating)
),
openers AS (
  SELECT comp_id, rating AS opener_rating FROM (VALUES
    (121825, 8.5), (132543, 3.5), (138675, 7.0), (160728, 7.1), (162740, 7.0)
  ) AS t(comp_id, opener_rating)
)
SELECT
  d.comp_id,
  d.curr_title,
  d.installment,
  d.pct_retained,
  d.rating,
  o.opener_rating,
  ROUND((d.rating - o.opener_rating)::numeric, 2) AS rating_delta
FROM data d
JOIN openers o ON o.comp_id = d.comp_id
ORDER BY d.comp_id, d.installment;

raw_sql:
SELECT
  d.comp_id,
  d.curr_title,
  d.installment,
  d.pct_retained,
  d.rating,
  o.opener_rating,
  ROUND((d.rating - o.opener_rating)::numeric, 2) AS rating_delta
FROM (VALUES
  (121825, 'Back to the Future Part II',  1989, 2, 38.1::numeric, 7.7::numeric),
  (121825, 'Back to the Future Part III', 1990, 3, 33.3::numeric, 7.3::numeric),
  (132543, 'San Barukan Movie',           1981, 2, 16.7::numeric, 5.7::numeric),
  (132543, 'Ohranger vs Kakuranger',      1995, 3,  7.7::numeric, 4.2::numeric),
  (132543, 'Kamen Rider Movie 2010',      2010, 5,  0.0::numeric, 6.4::numeric),
  (132543, 'Kamen Rider Fourze Movie',    2012, 6,  0.0::numeric, 6.0::numeric),
  (132543, 'Super Hero Taisen',           2012, 7, 57.1::numeric, 6.9::numeric),
  (138675, 'Peace, Love & Understanding', 1992, 2,100.0::numeric, 5.8::numeric),
  (138675, 'Beavis & Butt-Head Do America',1996,3,100.0::numeric, 6.6::numeric),
  (160728, 'Sailor Moon S Movie',         1994, 2, 66.7::numeric, 7.0::numeric),
  (160728, 'Sailor Moon SuperS Movie',    1995, 3, 80.6::numeric, 7.0::numeric),
  (160728, 'Sailor Moon SuperS Plus',     1995, 4, 27.3::numeric, 8.5::numeric),
  (162740, 'Blade II',                    2002, 2,  7.7::numeric, 6.6::numeric),
  (162740, 'Blade: Trinity',              2004, 3, 10.0::numeric, 5.8::numeric)
) AS d(comp_id, curr_title, curr_year, installment, pct_retained, rating)
JOIN (VALUES
  (121825, 8.5::numeric),
  (132543, 3.5::numeric),
  (138675, 7.0::numeric),
  (160728, 7.1::numeric),
  (162740, 7.0::numeric)
) AS o(comp_id, opener_rating) ON o.comp_id = d.comp_id
ORDER BY d.comp_id, d.installment;
